summary: iter14 share-link join flow — Backend 8/8 PASS, Frontend E2E for ALL 3 entry points (Quick Join, Login, Signup) verified end-to-end. New student signed up via share link is auto-approved, gets the exam granted, and lands on /app/exams with the exam visible. Demo student via Log In gets auto-claim → /app/exams. Quick Join regression intact. Route conflict from iter13 is now fixed (/attempt/:attemptId). No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: routes_signup.py auto-approval correctly hinges on either settings.auto_approve_signups OR data.from_share_link — clean & defensible. Activity log entry created. Good.

routes_exams.py /claim endpoint uses $addToSet on both sides (student.exam_ids AND exam.assigned_student_ids) → idempotent and consistent. Correctly rejects admin/teacher with 403 and unpublished exams with 403. Returns 404 for missing exam_id. Solid.

PublicExamJoin.jsx: auto-claim useEffect depends only on [examId] — if a logged-in student happens to land here with the auth status changing later it won't retry, but this is acceptable as it's a one-shot landing.
Signup.jsx examIdFromNext regex is tolerant ([a-f0-9-]+) — good. The link to /login preserves the next param via encodeURIComponent. Good.

Minor: PublicExamJoin.jsx still has `submitJoin` calling navigator.clipboard inside creds-copy; works but flagged from iter13 (toast vs. persistent card is now handled — persistent creds-card shown). No action.

Minor: /auth/me returns the student doc directly (not wrapped in {user:...}); tests adjusted accordingly. Consistent with /auth/student/login response which DOES wrap under {user:...}. Slight API inconsistency but not a blocker.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (3/3 entry flows verified end-to-end + Quick Join regression)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_iter14_* students via signup + Quick Join with mobiles starting 91230xxxxx. teardown_class best-effort delete via DELETE /api/admin/students/<id>. Two extra Quick-Join guests may persist if backend doesn't expose that delete route — safe to bulk-clean by filtering name LIKE 'TEST_iter14_'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter14 share-link flow is fully verified at backend + frontend. Exam id 562bc01a-b273-4f2b-a362-de6c63f760d1 ('jee', 1 question, published, 12th class) was used as the reference exam. For future tests please use mobile prefix 91230xxxxx (iter14) or 91231xxxxx (iter15+) to avoid collisions. /auth/me returns the user dict at root, not wrapped under {user:...}.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration. Iter13's route-conflict bug has been resolved by moving the protected exam-portal route to /attempt/:attemptId.
